description: Bundled IACA (Issuing Authority Certificate Authority) certificates for mDL verification
notes: These are interim certificates for development and testing.
For production, obtain official IACA certificates via AAMVA DTS API.
1. Apply for AAMVA membership at https://aamva.org/membership (2-4 weeks)
2. Request DTS API access through the AAMVA member portal
3. Receive OAuth2 credentials and configure backend secrets
